name: Mix and Match Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans diced tomatoes with basil, garlic, and oregano, drained
1 can cut green Italian beans (14 1/2-ounce), drained
1 can asparagus cuts and tips (10 1/2-ounce), drained
2 cans solid white tuna in spring water, (6-ounce) drained and flaked
1 pound ground beef, browned and drained
1/4 cup chopped red or green bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 (8-ounce) container sour cream, 1 cup milk, 1 cup water, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1 teaspoon pepper with Sauce Maker (omit sour cream and milk when using tomatoes). Stir in Vegetable.
2. Add Pasta/Rice, Meat/Fish/Poultry, and Extras to the sauce mixture.
3. Spoon the mixture into a lightly greased 13- x 9-inch baking dish.
4. Bake, covered, at 350°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
5. Remove the cover and sprinkle with Toppings. Bake an additional 10 minutes until heated through and bubbly.
6. Makes 6 servings.
Invent your own one-dish combinations by switching ingredients for variety. Each casserole bakes for 1 hour and 20 minutes, eliminating the need to precook the pasta or rice. Experiment with different flavors and create family favorites.
